import React from "react"; import reactDom from "react-dom"; import {Link,Routes, Route, Navigate, BrowserRouter} from 'react-router-dom'; import './Design.css'; let gifts = [ { id : 1, Image :"Image 1", Name : "Gift Name 1", Price : " Gift Price 1", Quantitiy : "Gift Details 1" }, { id : 2, Image : "Image 2", Name : "Gift Name 2", Price : " Gift Price 2", Quantitiy : "Gift Details 2" }, { id : 3, Image : "Image 3", Name : "Gift Name 3", Price : " Gift Price 3", Quantitiy : "Gift Details 3" }, { id : 4, Image : "Image 4", Name : "Gift Name 4", Price : " Gift Price 4", Quantitiy : "Gift Details 4" }, { id : 5, Image : "Image 5", Name : "Gift Name 5", Price : " Gift Price 5", Quantitiy : "Gift Details 5" }, { id : 6, Image : "Image 6", Name : "Gift Name 6", Price : " Gift Price 6", Quantitiy : "Gift Details 6" } ] function addGifts(Gifts){ const[gift_name,setGiftName]=useState(''); const[gift_price,setGiftPrice]=useState(''); const[imageurl,setImageURL]=useState(''); const[gift_desc,setGiftDEsc]=useState(''); const[gift_quantity,setGiftQuantity]=useState(''); const handleClick=(e)=>{ e.preventDefault() const gift={gift_name,gift_price,imageurl,gift_desc,gift_quantity} console.log(gift) fetch("http://localhost:8080/admin/addTheme", { method:"POST", headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"}, body:JSON.stringify(theme) }).then(()=>{alert("Theme Submitted")}) } return <>

< div className="box" id = {gifts.id}> {gifts.Image} {gifts.Name} {gifts.Price} {gifts.Quantitiy} < Link to = "/editGIft" className="link1">Edit < Link to = "/editGIft" className="link1">Delete

) })}
